full_text:
Zhang Ya 張雅
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ya (張雅)was born in Kuaiji. Raised troops to help Wang Lang. Murdered Shang Sheng rather then surrender to He Qi but forced to do so later. Zhang Ya was affiliated with Wang Lang.
